verdict: off-diagonal weight = additive energy E_+ of the Bragg set (controlled by R-025/R-026); BCC Bogoliubov stability ratio R<1 (worst 0.916); class-wide certificate is the residual

claims.name: bragg_on_shell
claims.detail: (N=12 {110}-type vectors, all |k|=q0=0.6802: BCC first shell, p_2(0)=N=12 reproduces Math428)

claims.name: additive_energy_identity
claims.detail: (sum_Q p_2(Q)^2 = 540 = E_+ = #{(i,j,k,l):k_i+k_j=k_k+k_l} = 540: the off-diagonal weight IS the additive energy of the Bragg set)

claims.name: lemma_A_bound
claims.detail: (E_+=540 <= (1+T')N^2 = (1+4)*144 = 720: R-025 Lemma A holds; T'=4 is the max nonzero pair multiplicity, E_+/N^2 = 3.75)

claims.name: stability_ratio_below_one
claims.detail: (worst Bogoliubov ratio R = |off-diag|/diag = 0.916 < 1 at A=0.08: the entropy/diagonal curvature dominates the off-diagonal bubble => ||E^-1/2 B_od E^-1/2||<1 for BCC; Math428 continuum verdict recast as the operator stability inequality)

claims.name: small_A_quadratic_margin
claims.detail: (R(0.02)=0.118 << R(0.14)=0.510: off-diag share is O(A^4), diag O(A^2), so R = O(A^2) -> 0 as A->0; the worst point is the mid-window, not the small-A end)
